programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: Body cam and surveillance footage offer a view of high-stakes criminal cases; a routine traffic stop in New Mexico leads to a manhunt when an officer's radio goes silent.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: When officers conduct a routine welfare check on a disabled man and his elderly mother in Racine, Wisconsin, they uncover a shocking scene inside the home; what starts as a simple call unravels into a violent, unpredictable chain of events, all captured in real time on body-worn cameras and surveillance video.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: When a respected Cleveland doctor goes missing, a chilling investigation into his fractured family explodes into a 12-hour standoff and a brutal truth that no one saw coming; every second counts as the crime unfolds in real time, all from unfiltered surveillance footage and immersive bodycam of the officers on scene.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: A routine mail route turns deadly when a beloved postal worker is murdered in broad daylight; with body-worn cameras rolling, police and federal agents race to uncover the truth and what they find leads to shocking arrests that stun the entire community.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: A young Savannah mother is found shot on a neighbor's doorstep, and detectives uncover a chilling twist: her newborn twins have been abducted by a woman she met in a moms group; Bodycam captures every tense moment as police race against the clock to find the shooter and missing infants.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: As the Fourth of July weekend roasts Pima County, fireworks and tempers ignite; on his first July 4th shift, Deputy Cassels investigates an assault at a teen holiday party, while Deputy Allen recalls a foot chase through the desert where she almost became the victim of "friendly fire.".

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: In the unforgiving desert of Pima County, Arizona, Deputy Pool tracks down a reckless driver whose run from the law sparks a pursuit involving multiple units, while Deputy Casillas finds himself in a tense standoff where every move counts.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: Alcohol plus blistering heat make for a dangerous cocktail in Pima County, AZ; Deputy Tautimez Saavedra confronts a drunk driver threatening his neighbor with a handgun, while Deputy Pool finds a vehicle that may have been involved in a fatal hit-and-run.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: With Arizona having some of the loosest gun laws in the country, sheriff's deputies in Pima County constantly confront armed suspects; Deputy Reed deals with a pistol-packing argument at a supermarket checkout line, and Deputy Carter is called to a suspected armed home invasion.
